    1. go to a receptacle
        :action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    2. open a receptacle if it is closed
        :action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    4. take an object from another receptacle
        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
        :action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

    7. heat an object using a receptacle
        :action HeatObject

    8. clean an object using a receptacle
        :action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    9. cool an object using a receptacle
        :action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    10. slice an object using a sharp object
        :action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))

-= Welcome to TextWorld, ALFRED! =-. You are in the middle of a room. Looking quickly around you, you see a armchair 1, a coffeetable 1, a drawer 7, a drawer 6, a drawer 5, a drawer 4, a drawer 3, a drawer 2, a drawer 1, a garbagecan 1, a sidetable 3, a sidetable 2, a sidetable 1, a sofa 2, a sofa 1, and a tvstand 1.
Action: go to drawer 1
You arrive at drawer 1. The drawer 1 is closed.


You have already generated df and pf files according to the observations.
This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem find-remotecontrol)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer1)
        (not (open drawer1))
    )
    (:goal (at-agent armchair1))
)




You made some mistakes when generating those files. Here is the error message: 
Segmentation fault (core dumped)



Now rewrite both the domain and problem files with the minimal fix.

        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)

        :action PickupObject

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

    1. go to a receptacle
        :action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    2. open a receptacle if it is closed
        :action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    4. take an object from another receptacle
        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
        :action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    6. using an object/receptacle by turning it on/off with a switch
        :action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
    7. heat an object using a receptacle
        :action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    8. clean an object using a receptacle
        :action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    9. cool an object using a receptacle
        :action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    10. slice an object using a sharp object
        :action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)

- If the task requires finding an object, your near-term goal can be "be at" an unvisited receptacle.

-= Welcome to TextWorld, ALFRED! =-. You are in the middle of a room. Looking quickly around you, you see a armchair 1, a coffeetable 1, a drawer 7, a drawer 6, a drawer 5, a drawer 4, a drawer 3, a drawer 2, a drawer 1, a garbagecan 1, a sidetable 3, a sidetable 2, a sidetable 1, a sofa 2, a sofa 1, and a tvstand 1.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem find-remotecontrol)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        remotecontrol - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer1)
        (open drawer1)
    )
    (:goal (in remotecontrol armchair1))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)

        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject

You are in an environment that you must explore step by step. Your task is to build and update PDDL files for the environment using only your direct observations. Do not create or assume any objects, relationships, or details that have not been observed, and ensure you include all observations.

The environment is a room containing various objects. Some of these objects are on, in, or contained within other objects and receptacles. You will initially be located as init_receptacle. You can assume all receptacles are freely reachable.

You arrive at armchair 1. On the armchair 1, you see a creditcard 2, and a newspaper 1.

['examine armchair 1', 'go to coffeetable 1', 'go to drawer 1', 'go to drawer 2', 'go to drawer 3', 'go to drawer 4', 'go to drawer 5', 'go to drawer 6', 'go to drawer 7', 'go to garbagecan 1', 'go to sidetable 1', 'go to sidetable 2', 'go to sidetable 3', 'go to sofa 1', 'go to sofa 2', 'go to tvstand 1', 'take creditcard 2 from armchair 1', 'take newspaper 1 from armchair 1']

The following actions are allowed: 
    1. go to a receptacle
        :action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    2. open a receptacle if it is closed
        :action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    4. take an object from another receptacle
        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
        :action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    6. using an object/receptacle by turning it on/off with a switch
        :action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
    7. heat an object using a receptacle
        :action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    8. clean an object using a receptacle
        :action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    9. cool an object using a receptacle
        :action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    10. slice an object using a sharp object
        :action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)

Guidelines:
- Do NOT invent objects or receptacles that were not observed.
- If the task requires finding an object, your near-term goal can be "be at" an unvisited receptacle.
- PF goal MUST be grounded (no variables, no quantifiers).

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)

    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (not (open ?r))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (open ?r)
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

You arrive at drawer 3. The drawer 3 is closed.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard2 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol3 watch2 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer2)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer2)
    )
    (:goal (at-agent drawer3))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard2 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol3 watch2 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer3)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
    )
    (:goal (open drawer4))
)

You are in an environment that you must explore step by step. Your task is to build and update PDDL files for the environment using only your direct observations. Do not create or assume any objects, relationships, or details that have not been observed, and ensure you include all observations.

The environment is a room containing various objects. Some of these objects are on, in, or contained within other objects and receptacles. You will initially be located as init_receptacle. You can assume all receptacles are freely reachable.

Now, You arrive at drawer 1. The drawer 1 is closed.
Here are your current observations: Action: go to drawer 4
Nothing happens.

Action: open drawer 4
You open the drawer 4. The drawer 4 is open. In it, you see nothing.


Valid actions you are currently allowed to take:
['close drawer 3', 'close drawer 4', 'examine drawer 3', 'examine drawer 4', 'go to armchair 1', 'go to coffeetable 1', 'go to drawer 1', 'go to drawer 2', 'go to drawer 5', 'go to drawer 6', 'go to drawer 7', 'go to garbagecan 1', 'go to sidetable 1', 'go to sidetable 2', 'go to sidetable 3', 'go to sofa 1', 'go to sofa 2', 'go to tvstand 1']

The following actions are allowed: 
    1. go to a receptacle
        :action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    2. open a receptacle if it is closed
        :action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    4. take an object from another receptacle
        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
        :action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    6. using an object/receptacle by turning it on/off with a switch
        :action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
    7. heat an object using a receptacle
        :action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    8. clean an object using a receptacle
        :action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    9. cool an object using a receptacle
        :action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    10. slice an object using a sharp object
        :action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)

Guidelines:
- Do NOT invent objects or receptacles that were not observed.
- If the task requires finding an object, your near-term goal can be "be at" an unvisited receptacle.
- PF goal MUST be grounded (no variables, no quantifiers).
- PF init should not use "(not ...)" unless strictly necessary.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)

        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)

    )

        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )

        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard2 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol3 watch2 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer1)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
    )
    (:goal (open drawer1))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard2 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol3 watch2 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer7)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
    )
    (:goal (open drawer1))
)

    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard2 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol3 watch2 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent garbagecan1)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)
    )
    (:goal (at-agent sidetable1))
)

    1. go to a receptacle
        :action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    2. open a receptacle if it is closed
        :action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    4. take an object from another receptacle
        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
        :action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
