This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )

        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)

        :action OpenObject

        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)

        :action PickupObject

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj
            microwavereceptacle - receptacle
            fridgereceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwavereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgereceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard2 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol3 watch2 keychain1 statue1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent sidetable1)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)
        (open sidetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
    )
    (:goal (at-agent sidetable1))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol3 watch2 statue1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent sofa1)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)
        (open sidetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (open sofa1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
    )
    (:goal (at-agent sofa2))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types receptacle object - physobj)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol3 watch2 statue1 pillow1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent sofa2)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)
        (open sidetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (open sofa1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (open sofa2)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
    )
    (:goal (at-agent tvstand1))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )

        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))

        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)

    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)

        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)

        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))

    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent sidetable3)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)
        (open sidetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (open sidetable2)
        (open sofa1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (open sofa2)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
        (open tvstand1)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (open sidetable3)
        (holding box1)
    )
    (:goal (in box1 sidetable3))
)

    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)

        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)

        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)

        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )

        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

        :effect (clean ?o)
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )

        :parameters (?o - object)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

You are in an environment that you must explore step by step. Your task is to build and update PDDL files for the environment using only your direct observations. Do not create or assume any objects, relationships, or details that have not been observed, and ensure you include all observations.

The environment is a room containing various objects. Some of these objects are on, in, or contained within other objects and receptacles. You will initially be located as init_receptacle. You can assume all receptacles are freely reachable.

Now, You open the drawer 6. The drawer 6 is open. In it, you see nothing.
Here are your current observations: Action: go to drawer 1
You arrive at drawer 1. The drawer 1 is open. In it, you see nothing.


Valid actions you are currently allowed to take:
['close drawer 1', 'examine box 1', 'examine drawer 1', 'go to armchair 1', 'go to coffeetable 1', 'go to drawer 2', 'go to drawer 3', 'go to drawer 4', 'go to drawer 5', 'go to drawer 6', 'go to drawer 7', 'go to garbagecan 1', 'go to sidetable 1', 'go to sidetable 2', 'go to sidetable 3', 'go to sofa 1', 'go to sofa 2', 'go to tvstand 1']

The following actions are allowed: 
    1. go to a receptacle
        :action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    2. open a receptacle if it is closed
        :action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    4. take an object from another receptacle
        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
        :action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    6. using an object/receptacle by turning it on/off with a switch
        :action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
    7. heat an object using a receptacle
        :action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    8. clean an object using a receptacle
        :action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    9. cool an object using a receptacle
        :action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    10. slice an object using a sharp object
        :action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)

Guidelines:
- Do NOT invent objects or receptacles that were not observed.
- If the task requires finding an object, your near-term goal can be "be at" an unvisited receptacle.
- PF goal MUST be grounded (no variables, no quantifiers).
- PF init should not use "(not ...)" unless strictly necessary.

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent sidetable3)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)
        (open sidetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (open sidetable2)
        (open sofa1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (open sofa2)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
        (open tvstand1)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (open sidetable3)
        (holding box1)
    )
    (:goal (at-agent drawer1))
)

    )

        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )

            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

(define (problem explore-room)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent sidetable3)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)
        (open sidetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (open sidetable2)
        (open sofa1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (open sofa2)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
        (open tvstand1)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (open sidetable3)
        (in box1 sidetable3)
    )
    (:goal (holding box1))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
