(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)

        :action PickupObject

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)

    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )

        (holding box1)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)

        (open drawer2)

        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)

        (in statue1 sidetable1)

        (open sofa2)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
        (open tvstand1)

        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (open sidetable3)
    )
    (:goal (at-agent sidetable2))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)

        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )

        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )

        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))

    )

        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

The environment is a room containing various objects. Some of these objects are on, in, or contained within other objects and receptacles. You will initially be located as init_receptacle. You can assume all receptacles are freely reachable.

        :action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    2. open a receptacle if it is closed

    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    4. take an object from another receptacle
        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
        :action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent sidetable2)
        (open armchair1)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (open coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (open garbagecan1)
        (open sidetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (open sidetable2)
        (in box1 sidetable2)
        (open sofa1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (open sofa2)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
        (open tvstand1)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (open sidetable3)
    )
    (:goal (holding box1))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

        :effect (heated ?o)
    )

        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )

        :action CloseObject

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)

    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent armchair1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)

        (in watch2 coffeetable1)

        (in statue1 sidetable1)

        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (holding box1)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)

        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (in box1 armchair1)
    )
    (:goal (in box1 armchair1))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)
