    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types physobj receptacle object - physobj
            microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
            fridgeReceptacle - receptacle)
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

You are in an environment that you must explore step by step. Your task is to build and update PDDL files for the environment using only your direct observations. Do not create or assume any objects, relationships, or details that have not been observed, and ensure you include all observations.

The environment is a room containing various objects. Some of these objects are on, in, or contained within other objects and receptacles. You will initially be located as init_receptacle. You can assume all receptacles are freely reachable.

Now, You arrive at drawer 1. The drawer 1 is open. In it, you see nothing.
Here are your current observations: Action: take pillow 1 from sofa 2
You pick up the pillow 1 from the sofa 2.


Valid actions you are currently allowed to take:
['examine pillow 1', 'examine sofa 2', 'go to armchair 1', 'go to coffeetable 1', 'go to drawer 1', 'go to drawer 2', 'go to drawer 3', 'go to drawer 4', 'go to drawer 5', 'go to drawer 6', 'go to drawer 7', 'go to garbagecan 1', 'go to sidetable 1', 'go to sidetable 2', 'go to sidetable 3', 'go to sofa 1', 'go to tvstand 1', 'move pillow 1 to sofa 2']

The following actions are allowed: 
    1. go to a receptacle
        :action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    2. open a receptacle if it is closed
        :action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    3. close a receptacle
        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    4. take an object from another receptacle
        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    5. put object into/on/in another receptacle
        :action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    6. using an object/receptacle by turning it on/off with a switch
        :action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
    7. heat an object using a receptacle
        :action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    8. clean an object using a receptacle
        :action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    9. cool an object using a receptacle
        :action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    10. slice an object using a sharp object
        :action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)

        (in watch2 coffeetable1)

        (in statue1 sidetable1)

        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)

        (in box1 armchair1)
        (holding pillow1)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent drawer1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (in box1 armchair1)
        (holding pillow1)
    )
    (:goal (in pillow1 sofa2))
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

        :effect (clean ?o)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent sofa2)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (in box1 armchair1)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
    )
    (:goal (in pillow1 sofa2))
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

    )

    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )

        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)

    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (at-agent ?from)
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

        :action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)

        :action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 coffeetable1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (in box1 armchair1)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
    )
    (:goal (in laptop1 armchair1))
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent armchair1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (in creditcard2 armchair1)
        (in newspaper1 armchair1)
        (in remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (in watch2 coffeetable1)
        (in laptop1 armchair1)
        (in keychain1 sidetable1)
        (in statue1 sidetable1)
        (in creditcard1 sofa1)
        (in keychain2 sofa1)
        (in keychain3 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (in remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (in television1 tvstand1)
        (in watch1 tvstand1)
        (in box1 armchair1)
        (in pillow1 sofa2)
    )
    (:goal (in laptop1 armchair1))
)

        :effect (not (open ?r))

    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )

        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

    )

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

        (in pillow1 sofa2)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (switched-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (switched-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
