(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (on ?x - physobj)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (in ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (on ?x - physobj)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (in ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (in ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (in ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file:

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous problem file: 
(define (problem explore-room)
    (:domain exploration)
    (:objects
        creditcard1 creditcard2 keychain1 keychain2 keychain3 newspaper1 laptop1 remotecontrol1 remotecontrol2 remotecontrol3 television1 watch1 watch2 statue1 pillow1 box1 - object
        armchair1 coffeetable1 drawer1 drawer2 drawer3 drawer4 drawer5 drawer6 drawer7 garbagecan1 sidetable1 sidetable2 sidetable3 sofa1 sofa2 tvstand1 - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (at-agent coffeetable1)
        (open drawer1)
        (open drawer2)
        (open drawer3)
        (open drawer4)
        (open drawer5)
        (open drawer6)
        (open drawer7)
        (on creditcard2 armchair1)
        (on newspaper1 armchair1)
        (on remotecontrol3 coffeetable1)
        (on watch2 coffeetable1)
        (on keychain1 sidetable1)
        (on statue1 sidetable1)
        (on creditcard1 sofa1)
        (on keychain2 sofa1)
        (on keychain3 tvstand1)
        (on remotecontrol2 tvstand1)
        (on remotecontrol1 tvstand1)
        (on television1 tvstand1)
        (on watch1 tvstand1)
        (on box1 armchair1)
        (on pillow1 sofa2)
        (holding laptop1)
    )
    (:goal (on laptop1 coffeetable1))
)

        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )

        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject

        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )

        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )

        :effect (not (open ?r))

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

    )

(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration)
    (:requirements :strips :equality :typing)
    (:types 
        physobj
        receptacle - physobj
        object - physobj
        microwaveReceptacle - receptacle
        fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
    )
    (:predicates
        (at-agent ?r - receptacle)
        (open ?r - receptacle)
        (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        (holding ?o - object)
        (powered-on ?o - object)
        (clean ?o - object)
        (sliced ?o - object)
        (sharp ?o - object)
        (heated ?o - object)
        (cooled ?o - object)
    )
    (:action GotoLocation
        :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?from) (not (= ?from ?to)))
        :effect (and (not (at-agent ?from)) (at-agent ?to))
    )
    (:action OpenObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (not (open ?r)))
        :effect (open ?r)
    )
    (:action CloseObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r))
        :effect (not (open ?r))
    )
    (:action PickupObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (and (not (on ?o ?r)) (holding ?o))
    )
    (:action PutObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (holding ?o))
        :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (on ?o ?r))
    )
    (:action useObject
        :parameters (?o - object)
        :precondition (holding ?o)
        :effect (powered-on ?o)
    )
    (:action HeatObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (heated ?o)
    )
    (:action CoolObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (cooled ?o)
    )
    (:action CleanObject
        :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?o ?r))
        :effect (clean ?o)
    )
    (:action SliceObject
        :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
        :precondition (and (at-agent ?r) (open ?r) (on ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o) (sharp ?sharp_o))
        :effect (sliced ?co)
    )
)
